Gather ye crew, for on October 11th 6:30pm EST, we be settin’ sail on a grand pirate adventure!

Cleaning out storage and came across this. Anyone want it? Just pay shipping. https://t.co/LVF2GbyU3I
First response gets it
Winner was chosen!

Any defensive front without The Blob at D Tackle/Nose Tackle is ignorant.
Also the Juggernaut is a million times a fullback the Flash could ever be. Flash is a Z receiver. Spidey is a slot or a DB. https://t.co/MDmOSYmfcj
Cap is the Mike. Batman is in the scouting department.
Taking from what is left, this is my lineup to go against this proposed below. This is made as a non-Dragonball/non-anime nerd https://t.co/24RdeHdN42 https://t.co/MDmOSYmfcj

RT @KP11Studios: Hey ho me Mateys!!
Today is the day we set said for the grand open waters!

When you’re at a crossroads, it’s best to have some friends at your side… From the studio that brought you @LifeIsStrange comes a brand new limited actual play series starting @ThatBronzeGirl , @quiddie , @IfyNwadiwe , @thebeccascott and myself.
